report.summary: Seventh standup Apr 2: 44 learn pages (+2 since v6), 32,739 total lines (+7.7%). New: Decentralized Identity (DID) Guide (1,061 lines) and Decentralized Storage Guide (1,274 lines). Build ran since last standup. 89 uncommitted files (+1). Day 11+ deploy gap persists — 6 unqueued guides stockpiled.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v6): 2 new learn pages detected — total now 44 (up from 42). New: Decentralized Identity (DID) & Verifiable Credentials Guide (1,061 lines) and Decentralized Storage (Filecoin/Arweave/IPFS) Guide (1,274 lines).
CONTENT VOLUME: 32,739 lines across 44 learn page.tsx files (up from 30,404 — +2,335 lines, +7.7%). Average page size: 744 lines (up from 724).
PUBLISH QUEUE: Still empty after v6 clearance. 6 guides now unqueued and awaiting addition: BTCfi, Wallet Security, Tokenomics, Portfolio Rebalancing, Decentralized Identity, Decentralized Storage.
UNCOMMITTED FILES: cryptodegen 89 files (up from 88 in v6). Degen0x workspace has no git repo — all 44 learn pages exist only as local files.

SEO PIPELINE: Both new pages confirmed with Metadata exports, Article+FAQPage structured data, OpenGraph article metadata, comprehensive keyword arrays. DID guide links to smart wallets/privacy/DAO governance/ZK rollups. Storage guide links to DePIN/AI agents/tokenomics/data availability.
NO GSC/VERCEL ANALYTICS accessible from sandbox — all metrics derived from local file analysis.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE ACTIVITY: 1 agent ran since last standup — build created DID + Decentralized Storage guides. Today's total: 33 agent runs (standup×7, build×8, community×7, design×6, eod×4, publish×1). Highest daily throughput recorded.

COMPLETED SINCE LAST STANDUP: Build cycle created 2 new learn guides — Decentralized Identity covering W3C DID standards, World ID (25M users), Polygon ID ZK proofs, ENS, eIDAS 2.0; and Decentralized Storage covering Filecoin (14+ EiB), Arweave permanent storage, IPFS, 6-protocol comparison.

P0 BLOCKER (Day 11+, PERSISTENT): No production deploy since commit 3b2dd28 (Apr 1). 44 learn guides + all accumulated changes exist only locally. 89 uncommitted files in cryptodegen. Content stockpile at record size — deploy ROI increasing every cycle.
P1 — 6 PAGES UNQUEUED: BTCfi, Wallet Security, Tokenomics, Portfolio Rebalancing (from last cycle) plus Decentralized Identity, Decentralized Storage (this cycle) need adding to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
P2 — CONTENT VELOCITY: 44 learn pages = 32,739 lines on disk. At ~2 pages/cycle build rate, could hit 50 pages within 3 more build cycles.
P3 — TIME-SENSITIVE: Ethereum Pectra upgrade ~8 days (Apr 10), US tax deadline ~13 days (Apr 15) — guides exist but remain undeployed.
P4 — CONTENT CALENDAR: 349 tweets drafted through Jul 26 (+15 from community-v7). Newsletter v22 ready. Social cards for AI Tokens Breakout, CLARITY Act, Courses Launch created.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY AUTHORIZATION (P0, CRITICAL, Day 11+): 44 learn guides, 89 uncommitted files, 349 tweet drafts, 6 unqueued pages — all stuck locally. The content-to-deploy ratio is the worst it's ever been. Every hour of delay is ~744 lines of content generating zero organic impressions. A single git commit+push is the highest-ROI action by an order of magnitude.

PRIORITY 2 — REFILL PUBLISH QUEUE WITH 6 PAGES: Queue emptied last cycle. 6 high-value guides ready to queue: BTCfi (emerging narrative), Wallet Security (evergreen, high search volume), Tokenomics (fundamental education), Portfolio Rebalancing (practical tool-adjacent), Decentralized Identity (DID market $5B→$58B CAGR), Decentralized Storage (Filecoin 14+ EiB, AI data convergence). These cover critical Web3 infrastructure topics.

PRIORITY 3 — SHIFT TO DEPLOYMENT PREP OVER CONTENT CREATION: With 44 guides on disk and the queue cycling properly, the bottleneck is shipping not writing. Next cycles should prioritize: (a) committing all accumulated changes, (b) verifying build, (c) resolving 141 TS errors in 4 known files, (d) pushing to production. Content velocity is strong — deploy velocity is zero.
